title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
description: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.

title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
description: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
description: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.

title: Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection

title: Data and Evaluation Closed-Loop for Model Capability Enhancement
description:
arXiv:2606.28471v1 Announce Type: new

title: GPTNT: Benchmarking Real-Time Collaboration Between Multimodal Agents on Keep Talking And Nobody Explodes
description:

title: IMCBench: A benchmark for multimodal LLMs in Image-grounded Medical Conversations
description:

title: Search for Truth from Reasoning: A Dynamic Representation Editing Framework for Steering LLM Trajectories
description:
arXiv:2606.28589v1 Announce Type: new

title: Advent Accelerates Deals with ChatGPT + Codex
description:
ChatGPT + Codex are a one-two punch for investment firms. 

"Having the ability to connect your deal folder with all of the context, and then be able to ask ChatGPT and Codex real time questions has been really impactful to our workflows," - Jasmine Azizi (Advent).

title: Builders Unscripted: Ep. 4 - Pietro Schirano
description:
Pietro Schirano, Founder & CEO of MagicPath sits down with Romain Huet to talk about pushing the creative edges of GPT-5.5 and using Codex to turn ideas into software.

description:

title: NON fare UNA SOLA ricerca su Google prima di vedere questo
description:
NON fare UNA SOLA ricerca su Google prima di vedere questo perché Google sta cambiando per sempre il modo in cui cerchiamo informazioni online.

Con AI Mode, Gemini, AI Overviews e le nuove funzioni di ricerca con intelligenza artificiale, Google non è più solo una barra dove scrivere parole chiave:
